title: Feature Root: Structured Handoff Fields Through Schema, Prompts, and Guardrails
description: Shared execution root for implementing structured handoff fields across data models, output schema, prompt assembly, developer guardrails, and follow-up validation/signoff.
acceptance_criteria: All required work for structured handoff fields is decomposed into focused implementation beads with explicit ordering.
Follow-up testing, documentation, and review occur after the combined implementation set is ready.
The planned file scope matches the spec: models, schema, prompt wiring, developer template, and orchestrator tests.
